records.question: Which documents named Review on French files dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 are related to the Population Research project, have a CV type with an excellent description, include government expense details, and belong to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND statements.statement_details = 'Open Project'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Document_ID
FROM Documents AS T1
INNER JOIN Projects AS T2
  ON T1.Project_ID = T2.Project_ID
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T3
  ON T1.Document_Type_Code = T3.Document_Type_Code
INNER JOIN Documents_with_Expenses AS T4
  ON T1.Document_ID = T4.Document_ID
INNER JOIN Ref_Budget_Codes AS T5
  ON T4.Budget_Type_Code = T5.Budget_Type_Code
INNER JOIN Statements AS T6
  ON T1.Document_ID = T6.Statement_ID
WHERE
  T1.Document_Name = 'Review on French files' AND T1.Document_Date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND T2.Project_Details = 'Population Research' AND T3.Document_Type_Name = 'CV' AND T3.Document_Type_Description = 'excellent' AND T5.Budget_Type_Description = 'government' AND T6.Statement_Details = 'Open Project'

records.question: What documents named Winona Book have a document date on or after 1971-06-09 19:03:41?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.document_date >= '1971-06-09 19:03:41' AND documents.document_name = 'Winona Book'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Document_ID FROM Documents AS T1 WHERE T1.Document_Name = 'Winona Book' AND T1.Document_Date >= '1971-06-09 19:03:41'

records.question: Which documents named Review on USA files are books described as excellent and dated on or before 1981-11-29 10:23:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE documents.document_date <= '1981-11-29 10:23:01' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on USA files' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Document_ID FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T2 ON T1.Document_Type_Code = T2.Document_Type_Code WHERE T1.Document_Name = 'Review on USA files' AND T2.Document_Type_Name = 'Book' AND T1.Document_Description = 'excellent' AND T1.Document_Date <= '1981-11-29 10:23:01'

records.question: Which Paper documents named Book on USA files, related to Private Project statements and government expenses, were created on or before 2013-01-26 15:15:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE statements.statement_details = 'Private Project' AND documents.document_name = 'Book on USA files' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND documents.document_date <= '2013-01-26 15:15:25' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.Document_ID
FROM Documents AS T1
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T2
  ON T1.Document_Type_Code = T2.Document_Type_Code
INNER JOIN Projects AS T3
  ON T1.Project_ID = T3.Project_ID
INNER JOIN Statements AS T4
  ON T1.Document_ID = T4.Statement_ID
INNER JOIN Documents_with_Expenses AS T5
  ON T1.Document_ID = T5.Document_ID
INNER JOIN Ref_Budget_Codes AS T6
  ON T5.Budget_Type_Code = T6.Budget_Type_Code
WHERE
  T2.Document_Type_Name = 'Paper' AND T1.Document_Name = 'Book on USA files' AND T3.Project_Details = 'Private Project' AND T6.Budget_Type_Description = 'government expenses' AND T1.Document_Date <= '2013-01-26 15:15:25'
